title: Death Star (disambiguation)
content:
[[File:Death_Star_Schematic_FH.png|thumb|right|250px|A schematic diagram of the first Death Star]]
'''Death Star''' could refer to several things:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Death Star]]''', a type of [[battle station]].
**'''[[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station|DS-1 Death Star Mobile Battle Station]]''', the first Death Star.
***[[Project Stardust]], the [[Galactic Empire]] project that constructed the battle station, sometimes referred to as the '''Death Star project'''.
****'''[[Death Star plans]]''', the schematics for the first Death Star.
**'''[[DS-2 Death Star II Mobile Battle Station]]''', the second Death Star.
***[[Death Star ruins|'''Death Star ruins''']], the aforementioned [[space station]]'s remnants on [[Kef Bir]].

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*[[Death Star/Legends|'''Death Star''']], a type of [[Battle station/Legends|battlestation]].
**'''[[Death Star prototype]]''', a prototype for the Death Star.
**[[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|'''DS-1 Orbital Battle Station''']], the first Death Star.
***'''[[Death Star plans/Legends|Death Star plans]]''', the schematics for the first Death Star.
**[[Death Star II/Legends|'''Death Star II''']], the second Death Star.
***'''[[Death Star ruins/Legends|Death Star ruins]]''', the aforementioned [[Space station/Legends|space station's]] remnants.
**'''[[Death Star III]]''', the third Death Star.

==[[In-universe|Out-of-universe]]==
*[[Death Star (novel)|'''''Death Star''''']], a novel
*[[Death Star (board game)]], a board game from [[Tsukuda Hobby]]
*[[Death Star (game)|'''''Death Star'' game''']], a canceled video game planned by [[LucasArts]]
*'''[[Star Wars (1977) 3|''Star Wars'' (1977) 3]]''', the third issue of [[Marvel Comics|Marvel's]] original [[Star Wars (1977)|''Star Wars'' series]], subtitled "'''Death Star!'''"
